attributes.description: Security dashboard monitoring GitGuardian audit log activity: user access, authentication events, incident interactions, and behavioral analytics.

query.esql:
FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart
  AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart
  AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_active_users = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.audit_log.member_email)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_active_users = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.audit_log.member_email)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.action_type == "CREATE"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.action_type == "CREATE"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.action_type == "DELETE"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.action_type == "DELETE"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.event_name == "user.logged_in"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS login_count = COUNT(*) BY day = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 day)
| SORT day ASC

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.event_name == "user.logged_in"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS login_count = COUNT(*) BY day = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 day)
| SORT day ASC

attributes.title: Daily User Login Events with Source IP (GitGuardian)

embeddableConfig.title: Daily User Login Events with Source IP (GitGuardian)

query.esql:
FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.event_name == "personal_access_token.created"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY day = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 day)
| SORT day

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND gitguardian.audit_log.event_name == "personal_access_token.created"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY day = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 day)
| SORT day

query.esql:
FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY source.ip, source.geo.country_name
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY source.ip, source.geo.country_name
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

query.esql:
FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
  AND STARTS_WITH(gitguardian.audit_log.event_name, "secret_incident")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY gitguardian.audit_log.member_email
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
  AND STARTS_WITH(gitguardian.audit_log.event_name, "secret_incident")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY gitguardian.audit_log.member_email
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

query.esql:
FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, gitguardian.audit_log.member_email, gitguardian.audit_log.event_name, gitguardian.audit_log.action_type, source.ip, source.geo.country_name, source.geo.city_name
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-gitguardian.audit_log-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "gitguardian.audit_log"
  AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND source.ip IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, gitguardian.audit_log.member_email, gitguardian.audit_log.event_name, gitguardian.audit_log.action_type, source.ip, source.geo.country_name, source.geo.city_name
| LIMIT 100
